title: Senior Financial Analyst - CCAvenue Global Group - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - CCAvenue Global Group - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
CCAvenue Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Vijayawada. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CCAvenue Global Group:
CCAvenue Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CCAvenue Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
